docket_entries.description: RETURNED MAIL: PLAINTIFF CLAIM AND ORDER

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TEMELO, MARGARITA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-11-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO APR-06-2015 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY TEMELO, MARGARITA AS TO DEFENDANT BERMUDEZ, ALEXANDER DBA  AB LIMOUSINE SERVICE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-11-2015 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-16-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-16-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---DANIEL NAVARRO. THE INTERPRETER'S IDENTIFICATION HAS BEEN VERIFIED, VIA EMPLOYEE BADGE OR OTHER DOCUMENTATION PROVING CERTIFICATION OR REGISTRATION AND PHOTO IDENTIFICATION. THE INTERPRETER HAS AN OATH ON FILE WITH THE COURT.NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-16-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TEMELO, MARGARITA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BERMUDEZ, ALEXANDER DBA  AB LIMOUSINE SERVICE $800.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $820.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
